api_key.description: TMDb API key (v3 auth), sent as the api_key query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: TMDb API base URL override for tests or proxies.

language.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language code applied to every request (e.g. en-US).

query.description: Search query text, required when reading the search_movies stream.

movie_id.description: TMDb movie id, required when reading the movie_details stream.
